articles.title: Site-selective valence isomerism as a unified electronic trigger for magnetism, chirality, and catalysis in Ni–carboxylate MOFs
articles.title_zh: 位点选择性价异构作为镍-羧酸盐 MOF 中磁性、手性和催化作用的统一电子触发器
articles.abstract: Nature Communications, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-71747-8 Site-selective valence isomerism in a Ni–carboxylate metal–organic framework simultaneously modulates magnetic properties, chiroptical response, and oxygen evolution catalysis, demonstrating that controlled metal-node valence states enable multifunctionality in reticular materials.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然通讯》，在线发布：2026 年 4 月 9 日； doi:10.1038/s41467-026-71747-8 Ni-羧酸盐金属有机骨架中的位点选择性价异构体同时调节磁性、手性光学响应和析氧催化，证明受控的金属节点价态能够实现网状材料的多功能性。
